title: Warm Crispy Uruguayan Egg Toast
description: Spicy, crispy toast topped with a poached egg and thyme butter, perfect for a brunch-mood start.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium heat.
In a small pan, melt butter until foamy, add garlic and thyme, and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Toast the bread slices on a grill or another skillet until golden brown, then brush each slice with the garlic‑thyme butter.
Bring a saucepan of water to a gentle simmer, then reduce heat so the water stays just below boiling.
Crack each egg into a small cup and slide into the simmering water, cooking for 3 minutes for a runny yolk.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a separate skillet, add smoked paprika and cayenne, and sauté for 30 seconds.
Place the toasted bread in the skillet, top each slice with a poached egg, drizzle with the paprika oil, and sprinkle with parsley.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon juice, season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
